CustomField.formula:
(Active_Baseline__r.PR50LCH_Grant_Total__c +
IF(ISPICKVAL(Version_Status__c,'Draft'), IF(ISBLANK( Previous_Version__c ), PR50LCH_Grant_Total__c, IF(ISBLANK( Previous_Version__r.PR50LCH_Grant_Total__c ),PR50LCH_Grant_Total__c , PR50LCH_Grant_Total__c - Previous_Version__r.PR50LCH_Grant_Total__c)) , PR50LCH_Grant_Total__c) )
/
(Active_Baseline__r.PR50LCH_House_Count__c +
IF(ISPICKVAL(Version_Status__c,'Draft'), IF(ISBLANK( Previous_Version__c ), PR50LCH_House_Count__c, IF(ISBLANK( Previous_Version__r.PR50LCH_House_Count__c ),PR50LCH_House_Count__c , PR50LCH_House_Count__c - Previous_Version__r.PR50LCH_House_Count__c)) , PR50LCH_House_Count__c) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Average spend of low carbon heat pot per private rented (50% funded by landlord) home for all approved homes to date + current batch
CustomField.label: Grant Per House All Approved PR50LCH
